name: Cycode
description: Cycode application security posture management and code security

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Cycode
2. Go to Settings → API Tokens
3. Generate a new API token
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Cycode → Settings → API Tokens → Generate Token

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Cycode security platform is accessible

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies Cycode is actively scanning code repositories
